designSystem.style: Dark creative studio aesthetic with violet-led palette. Deep near-black backgrounds with vivid accent layers. Card-based inspiration feed with gradient visual headers. Micro-interaction focus with press animations, toggles, and expandable sections. Clean typographic hierarchy with 800-weight display headings and muted metadata labels.

screens: Echo Feed — Scrollable inspiration card feed with quick-capture strip, filter tags, multi-select for board generation, and a live CTA to generate boards from selected cards
Capture — Multi-modal input screen with photo/voice/ambient/place modes, live waveform visualization, mood tag selector, and one-tap save with AI auto-tagging indicator
Boards — Personal and shared mood board gallery with generated AI concept copy, extracted color palettes, writing prompts, and drill-down board detail view with source echo list
Spark Trail — Daily resurface feed of forgotten captures with context-aware reasons, streak tracker, expandable cards with add-to-board and view actions, and today's context summary card
Profile — User stats grid, top themes visualization, preference toggles (notifications, AI tagging), and settings list for subscription and data management

modals: Generate Output modal with progress state
